idea-plugin.name: AI Commit Message Generator
idea-plugin.description:
English

Generate polished Git commit messages from the files already selected in the JetBrains Commit tool window.

  • Configuration path: Settings / Preferences | Tools | AI Commit Message.
  • Writes the result directly into the Commit Message field.
  • Supports Claude and Codex/OpenAI-compatible relays, including local config discovery and cc-switch.
  • Includes a built-in commitlint-style git-commit Skill plus provider-specific local Skills.
  • Offers a Chinese/English settings UI, streaming updates, and sensitive-path filtering.

中文

根据 JetBrains Commit 工具窗口中已选择的文件，生成更完整、更规范的 Git commit message。

  • 将结果直接写入 Commit Message 输入框。
  • 支持 Claude 和 Codex/OpenAI 兼容中转站，并支持读取本地配置与 cc-switch。
  • 内置 commitlint 风格的 git-commit Skill，同时支持按提供方扫描本地 Skills。
  • 提供中英双语设置界面、流式输出和敏感路径过滤。
  • 配置入口：Settings / Preferences | Tools | AI Commit Message。
idea-plugin.change-notes:
English

  • Adjusted commit prompt body rules to group bullets by intent and impact instead of listing one bullet per file.
  • Scaled body bullet guidance for small, medium, and very large diffs, with extra coverage for 20+ file changes.
  • Clarified empty-selection messages and allowed empty included/selected change collections to keep the commit UI flow consistent.
  • Updated the bundled git-commit Skill and tests to match the grouped body guidance.
  • Removed remote screenshot references from the plugin description to avoid broken Marketplace images after repository changes.

中文

  • 调整提交信息正文规则，按意图和影响分组，而不是按文件逐条罗列。
  • 按小型、中型和超大型 diff 缩放正文 bullet 数量，并补充 20+ 文件变更的覆盖要求。
  • 优化未选择文件时的提示文案，并允许空的 included/selected 变更集合保持提交 UI 流程一致。
  • 同步更新内置 git-commit Skill 和测试，保持与分组正文规则一致。
